auth: public (MCP resource, no auth) — but internal thresholds STRIPPED via the formatter
formatter: src/lib/venue-public-formatter.ts :: formatVenueForResource (exported, pure, allow-list by construction)
error_contract: n/a (MCP resource read; empty venues array if none)
consumers: MCP agents reading mcp://algovault/venues (public). Internal thresholds (min_buy_sell_sample/last_eval_*) MUST NOT appear.
drift_check_command: node -e "const {formatVenueForResource}=require('./dist/lib/venue-public-formatter.js'); const out=formatVenueForResource({exchange_id:'X',status:'shadow',asset_count:1,integrated_at:'',promoted_at:null,retired_at:null,extension_count:0,notes:null,min_buy_sell_sample:10,last_eval_at:'',last_eval_pfe_wr:0.9,last_eval_buy_sell_count:5}); const forbidden=['min_buy_sell_sample','last_eval_at','last_eval_pfe_wr','last_eval_buy_sell_count','outcome_return_pct']; const leaked=forbidden.filter(k=>k in out); console.log(leaked.length===0?'OK no leak':'LEAK '+leaked)"
